title: ctenitis hemsleyana
intro: Ctenitis hemsleyana, also known as Hemsl's ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ctenitis hemsleyana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
